2603.22911.title: ForestPrune: High-ratio Visual Token Compression for Video Multimodal Large Language Models via Spatial-Temporal Forest Modeling
2603.22911.paper_summary: Due to the great saving of computation and memory overhead, token compression has become a research hot-spot for MLLMs and achieved remarkable progress in image-language tasks. However, for the video, existing methods still fall short of high-ratio token compression. We attribute this shortcoming to the insufficient modeling of temporal and continual video content, and propose a novel and training-free token pruning method for video MLLMs, termed ForestPrune, which achieves effective and high-ratio pruning via Spatial-temporal Forest Modeling. In practice, ForestPrune construct token forests across video frames based on the semantic, spatial and temporal constraints, making an overall comprehension of videos. Afterwards, ForestPrune evaluates the importance of token trees and nodes based on tree depth and node roles, thereby obtaining a globally optimal pruning decision. To validate ForestPrune, we apply it to two representative video MLLMs, namely LLaVA-Video and LLaVA-OneVision, and conduct extensive experiments on a bunch of video benchmarks. The experimental results not only show the great effectiveness for video MLLMs, e.g., retaining 95.8% average accuracy while reducing 90% tokens for LLaVA-OneVision, but also show its superior performance and efficiency than the compared token compression methods, e.g., +10.1% accuracy on MLVU and -81.4% pruning time than FrameFusion on LLaVA-Video.
2603.22911.paper_summary_zh: 由於計算和記憶體開銷的巨大節省，令牌壓縮已成為 MLLMs 的研究熱點，並在圖像語言任務中取得了顯著進展。<lb/>然而，對於視頻，現有方法仍然無法實現高比率的令牌壓縮。<lb/>我們將這一不足歸因於對時間和連續視頻內容建模的不足，並提出了一種新穎且無需訓練的視頻 MLLMs 令牌修剪方法，稱為 ForestPrune，通過時空森林建模實現有效且高比率的修剪。<lb/>在實踐中，ForestPrune 根據語義、空間和時間約束在視頻幀之間構建令牌森林，從而對視頻進行整體理解。<lb/>隨後，ForestPrune 根據樹的深度和節點角色評估令牌樹和節點的重要性，從而獲得全局最佳的修剪決策。<lb/>為了驗證 ForestPrune，我們將其應用於兩個代表性視頻 MLLMs，即 LLaVA-Video 和 LLaVA-OneVision，並在一系列視頻基準上進行了廣泛的實驗。<lb/>實驗結果不僅顯示出對視頻 MLLMs 的巨大有效性，例如在減少 90% 令牌的情況下，保留 LLaVA-OneVision 的 95.8% 平均準確率，還顯示出其相較於其他令牌壓縮方法的優越性能和效率，例如在 MLVU 上提高 10.1% 的準確率，並在 LLaVA-Video 上比 FrameFusion 減少 81.4% 的修剪時間。
2603.22911.author: Shaobo Ju et.al.
2603.22911.authors: Shaobo Ju, Baiyang Song, Tao Chen, Jiapeng Zhang, Qiong Wu, Chao Chang, HuaiXi Wang, Yiyi Zhou, Rongrong Ji
